papers.abstract: May 1, 2026 — More than 100 undergraduate students enrolled in the University of California San Diego’s new artificial intelligence major took their first major-specific course, CSE 25: Intro to AI, over winter quarter. The class aims to introduce AI principles that the students will see repeatedly over the next four years, and level the playing […] The post UC San Diego Students Get an Intro to AI in First AI Major Class appeared first on HPCwire.
